name: depo-injekcije-psa
description: Windows aplikacija v7 za ambulanti Medur in Koper; patch 2.0.6 naloži podatke izbrane ambulante iz oblaka in drugo ambulanto ohrani samo za ogled.
author: Kemal Jazavac

scripts.test: node tests/storage.test.js && node tests/project.test.js && node tests/cloud-contract.test.js && node tests/apps-script.test.js && node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check storage-core.js && node --check tools/configure-github.js && node --check electron-builder.config.js
